name: norequest
description: Plugins for AI coding agents from norequest. Current plugins: cost-guard, a cost and runaway guard for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, Copilot CLI and Cursor.

plugins.name: cost-guard
plugins.description: Detects loops, failure streaks, and tool-call/time budgets in the free preToolUse path, then denies or checkpoints before spend runs away. Writes one session record per run and can POST to a central collector.
